description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:2.7-alpine Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs only on the master branch, publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and executes the following script steps in order: pip install markdown2; mkdir public; cd public; markdown2 ../README.md > index.html --extras fenced-code-blocks,header-ids,toc; echo -e "<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset='utf8' /><title>GitLab Pages Custom Domain</title><base href='https://gitlab-pages-custom-domain-lets-encrypt.info/'><script>if (location.protocol !== 'https:') location = location.href.replace(/^http:/, 'https:')</script></head><body>\n$(cat index.html)\n</body></html>" > index.html; mkdir -p .well-known/acme-challenge/; echo "08PIwq_nRrejyzcrnEKIa45BSIEokONUUDqZqRL9mDU.sw_5kQJ6fLWbKJzNjiVMHAflmIq4NmnbqZ5UoW7I1cQ" > .well-known/acme-challenge/08PIwq_nRrejyzcrnEKIa45BSIEokONUUDqZqRL9mDU.
